particulars.description: 14 damside street lancaster land lying to the east of wood street lancaster land at classic leisure wood street lancaster and land fronting wood street butterfield street and dye house lane lancaster.

1. the freehold land fronting wood street, butterfield street and dye house lane, lancaster as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number LA767116; and. 2. the freehold land at classic leisure, wood street, lancaster LA1 1PS as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number LA900606; and. 3. the freehold land lying to the east of wood street, lancaster as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number LAN35553; and. 4. the freehold land known as 14 damside street, lancaster LA1 1PB as registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number LA788260.

(1) the freehold land fronting wood street, butterfield street and dye house lane, lancaster title number: LA767116;. (2) the freehold land at classic leisure, wood street, lancaster LA1 1PS title number: LA900606;. (3) the freehold land lying to the east of wood street, lancaster title number: LAN35553; and. (4) the freehold land known as 14 damside street, lancaster LA1 1PB title number: LA788260.
